description.en: Exception raised on any errors. The reason for the exception is passed to the constructor as a string.

excerpt.es: Exception raised on any errors. The reason for the exception is passed to the constructor as a string.
excerpt.en: Exception raised on any errors. The reason for the exception is passed to the constructor as a string.

description.en: Enable capability (see RFC 5161). Most capabilities do not need to be enabled. Currently only the UTF8=ACCEPT capability is supported (see RFC 6855). Added in version 3.5: The enable() method itself, and RFC 6855 support.

excerpt.es: Enable capability (see RFC 5161). Most capabilities do not need to be enabled. Currently only the UTF8=ACCEPT capability is supported (see RFC 6855). Added in version 3.5: The enable() method itself, ...
excerpt.en: Enable capability (see RFC 5161). Most capabilities do not need to be enabled. Currently only the UTF8=ACCEPT capability is supported (see RFC 6855). Added in version 3.5: The enable() method itself, ...

description.en: Permanently remove deleted items from selected mailbox. Generates an EXPUNGE response for each deleted message. Returned data contains a list of EXPUNGE message numbers in order received.

excerpt.es: Permanently remove deleted items from selected mailbox. Generates an EXPUNGE response for each deleted message. Returned data contains a list of EXPUNGE message numbers in order received.
